replies.msg:
Tweet by PEN Hong Kong

"URGENT APPEAL ON BEHALF OF WRITER TANG SIU WA: PEN Hong Kong has learned that renowned Hong Kong writer Tang Siu Wa has been arrested, apparently at Hong Kong’s Polytechnic University. While we still do not know the full details of the case, we reiterate our support for freedom of speech and creative freedom for all writers, which includes the rights writers should enjoy as citizens, such as the right to demonstration and assembly. We also request for immediate updates on her status and well being. We urge the authorities to ensure that while she remains in custody she is not subjected to torture or other ill-treatment, that she has access to legal representation of her choice, her family and any medical care she may require. "

https://twitter.com/hongkongpen/status/1196974413398204416

Tweet by PEN Hong Kong

"URGENT APPEAL ON BEHALF OF WRITER TANG SIU WA: PEN Hong Kong has learned that renowned Hong Kong writer Tang Siu Wa has been arrested, apparently at Hong Kong’s Polytechnic University. While we still do not know the full details of the case, we reiterate our support for freedom of speech and creative freedom for all writers, which includes the rights writers should enjoy as citizens, such as the right to demonstration and assembly. We also request for immediate updates on her status and well being. replies.msg:
物化女性指控
社運左膠經常倡議男女平等這個左翼思想，但在「雨傘革命」期間，陳雲facebook中一句「行動升級」，引來包括何韻詩、鄧小樺、泛民等社運左膠群起批評，甚至向嶺南大學施壓，要求褫奪其教職。[9] 但當及後陶君行在城大退聯一事上出言侮辱梁麗幗，不少社運左膠包括葉寶琳、林輝、陳景輝卻迴避指責陶君行。陶君行更稱「係人都知我所謂屌係指罵」，指他人將其說話無限放大，但仇思達指其說法「解唔通」。[10]

https://evchk.wikia.org/zh/wiki/%E5%B7%A6%E8%86%A0
